name: hud_ui_composite_panel_entry_constructor_copy
description: HudUiCompositePanelEntry::ConstructorCopy delegates the panel slice to HudUiPanel::CopyConstructCore, copies the seven trailing flash fields, and installs the transition-text-panel ftable.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiPanel::CopyConstructCore, which is functionally accepted but still carries inherited copy/font-clone byte-shape drift.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ConstructorCopy@HudUiCompositePanelEntry@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4bc410 still fails: 198 unmasked mismatches, 32 relocation bytes masked, 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 111 bytes and the VC object symbol is 240 bytes. The drift follows the inherited HudUiPanel::CopyConstructCore byte-shape plus trailing flash-field copy and ftable install scheduling.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiPanel::CopyConstructCore, flash field copies at offsets 0x2a4 through 0x2bc, final ftable install to g_HudUiTransitionTextPanel_FTable, and thiscall return of self.
The native composite-entry smoke validates ConstructorCopy return value, installed transition-text ftable, copied panel fields, and copied flash fields.
